name: Canada

group.value: Group B — opponents Bosnia and Herzegovina, Qatar, Switzerland

qualification.value: Auto-qualified as co-host (USA/Canada/Mexico); third World Cup appearance and first on home soil

wc_role.value: Co-host nation; third World Cup appearance, first on home soil

key_players.value: Alphonso Davies (captain, Bayern Munich), Jonathan David (Juventus), Tajon Buchanan (Villarreal)

squad_news.value: Marsch named the 26-man squad on 29 May 2026 (3 GK, 9 DF, 10 MF, 4 FW). Captain Alphonso Davies made the cut despite a hamstring strain that rules him out of the June 12 opener.
